intro: Neoaulacolepis clemensiae, also known as Clemens' aulacolepis, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Neoaulacolepis clemensiae has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and oxidative stress.
